goal: Persistently project current organization state and agent session observability into Mission Control.
risk: AOF may show transient runtime activity while humans still cannot see the stable organization/session state after execution.
loss_boundary: Do not claim Mission Control projection is useful unless councils, teams, roles, latest session stream, audit status, archmap impact, and next action remain visible from canonical artifacts after execution.
acceptance_gates: mission-control.json includes agent_session_observability derived from agent-session and audit artifacts
viewer renders persistent organization and session evidence sections
runtime-situation tests cover the new projection
evidence_plan: schema, visibility-export, visibility-serve, runtime tests, session-observability-audit, Council review
stop_conditions: stop when mission-control payload validates, viewer has persistent sections, tests pass, and governance audit passes
